Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HEARING REQUIRED: No appearances, court rules as follows: DEFENDANT SHAY BARKER's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is denied. No proof of service and no appearance. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)

Defendant appears after calling of case at approximately 10:05 a.m.
